locked_variables.hook: 48 小時內，把你的頁面改成會有人加 LINE 的版本。
locked_variables.offer: 免費 48h 成交診斷，先指出漏斗缺口，不承諾成交。
locked_variables.visual_claim: 1 變因：本輪只測 CTA text，樣本不足不換冠軍。

stage_priorities.label: 連結點擊
stage_priorities.source_surface: 社群平台連結點擊報表 / remote D1 link_click
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate count 與報表截圖/匯出檔路徑；不要貼使用者名單。

stage_priorities.label: 落地頁瀏覽
stage_priorities.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
stage_priorities.source_metric: page_view count by asset_id / content_id / variant_id
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate page views；不要存 IP、User-Agent、個人識別。

stage_priorities.label: CTA 點擊
stage_priorities.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
stage_priorities.source_metric: cta_click count by asset_id / content_id / variant_id
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate CTA clicks；不要存個別 session 明細。

stage_priorities.label: LINE 進線 / 加好友
stage_priorities.source_surface: LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate
stage_priorities.source_metric: line_add aggregate count by tracking context
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記新增數或進線數；不要貼 LINE user id、暱稱、聊天內容。

stage_priorities.label: 留資
stage_priorities.source_surface: LINE 客服手動分桶 / lead qualification aggregate
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記合格留資數；不要貼姓名、電話、email、公司私密資料。

stage_priorities.label: 成交
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記成交筆數與金額桶；不要貼付款資訊、ECPay 訂單或退款資料。

stage_priorities.label: 品質 / 垃圾訊號
stage_priorities.source_surface: LINE 客服手動分桶 / quality aggregate
stage_priorities.source_metric: quality_flag count and optional aggregate quality_score
stage_priorities.evidence_rule: 只記品質旗標數；不要貼對話原文或客戶資料。

immediate_actions.note: Run locally only after reviewing the template. This creates an owner working copy, not a live scoring input.

immediate_actions.command: Open data/source_capture/source_capture_ledger.filled.csv and fill aggregate_count plus evidence fields.
immediate_actions.note: Use aggregate counts only. Do not paste customer rows or chat text.

next_p0_owner_form.export_contract: Focused owner-reviewed aggregate-count download only. It is not a live input CSV and does not stage or apply data.

schedule_catchup.next_safe_action: No catch-up needed. Review owner_console.html and wait for the next Sunday local run.

redline_priority.next_operator_action: p0_collect_sample_gate_counts: Open next_p0_owner_form.html or next_p0_quick_capture.md, fill aggregate-only P0 counts, then rerun owner intake/weekly verification.

checks.evidence: config/growth-loop.config.json matches the requested Sunday sequence.
Lock fixtures prove a live PID always owns the run regardless of age and only dead/invalid owners are recovered.
pipeline_status.json preserves the requested sequence.
pipeline_status.json has one evidence row per requested step.
Weekly runner uses an atomic process lock and atomic status replacement so overlapping manual, LaunchAgent, or agent invocations cannot corrupt the authoritative run state.
All objective output artifacts exist.
Scores include link clicks, LINE adds, leads, and deals.
North Star funnel reports LINE adds, leads, and deals per 100 link clicks without event writes or external effects.
The changed variable is one of hook / offer / visual_claim / cta_text.
Content drafts only change the active variable.
Fixture-only rotation coverage proves hook, offer, visual_claim, and cta_text can each vary alone.
Each draft has a unique post-level tracking link and content attribution row.
Sample thresholds match the objective.
Sample-insufficient rounds keep the current champion and variable.
Win rule requires 1.15 lift, sample threshold, and no quality regression.
Winning challenger can only be queued for human review.
A/B plan is 90/10 and does not change public links.
Manual conversion import remains preview-only.
LINE inbound playbook stays manual, inbound-only, aggregate-only, and blocks sensitive customer fields.
Real lp_events input is scanned for PII, unknown assets, duplicates, and malformed rows before scoring.
Full-funnel aggregate import previews top-to-bottom event counts without scoring or writing real lp_events.
Full-funnel aggregate fixtures block unknown assets, missing attribution, sensitive columns, sensitive values, and unsafe apply attempts.
Real-data apply fixtures block unconfirmed apply commands and copied example/template CSVs before they can write data/lp_events.jsonl.
Real-data input pack creates fill templates only and never creates live input CSVs or writes data/lp_events.jsonl.
Source readiness covers every north-star funnel event stage and remains read-only.
Live champion URL and LINE destination are observed read-only; local-only success UI is never counted as a lead.
Source-locked 3q-site candidate removes false-success lead UI and prepares no-PII page_view/cta_click telemetry without deployment.
Isolated fixtures prove pinned-ref, ancestry, target-drift, tuple-integrity, and missing-repo fail-closed behavior.
Read-only D1 metadata inventory detects whether the dedicated Growth Loop database exists without querying tables, reading customer data, or reusing CRM databases.
Live observation mirrors the validated Candidate/Champion/D1 evidence state while keeping all reads aggregate-only and any redeploy separately gated.
Fixture states prove deployment observation, schema evidence, and recurring aggregate-read authorization are independent without a live network refresh, table query, event POST, or external effect.
Week 0 D1 schema applies twice in disposable local state and passes integrity, seed, and constraint checks without remote D1 access.
D1 id config guard remains preview-only until explicit owner approval and exact live metadata match.
Weekly collect_data stays local until matching evidence exists, then permits only the approved aggregate-only remote path.
Plan-only fixtures prove only matching owner evidence, recurring-read approval, and post-gate readiness select remote aggregate collection.
Fixture Wrangler proves the approved remote path reads grouped counts only and excludes raw session, URL, referrer, metadata, and customer fields.
Champion release stack descends from the exact source lock, changes only the Worker and optional binding-preservation workflow, and this audit performs no GitHub write.
Champion patch applies to a clean git archive or locked snapshot, matches the generated candidate byte-for-byte, and passes both Wrangler dry-run command shapes with an owner-gated rollback packet.
Champion GitHub handoff targets the exact known repo, branch, and commit, stops at a draft PR, and performs no GitHub write.
Source capture pack maps tracking links and funnel stages to aggregate-only owner capture rows without creating live inputs or writing data/lp_events.jsonl.
Sample-gate replay fixtures prove the 18-row owner-filled fast path can compile and preview sample decisions without writing data/lp_events.jsonl.
Source capture compile validates filled owner ledgers and emits owner-preview CSVs without creating live inputs or writing data/lp_events.jsonl.
Source capture compile fixtures cover valid filled rows, empty templates, partial blanks, PII, bad dates, and invalid target files.
Real-data intake plan checks reviewed aggregate CSVs and produces owner-gated local apply commands without writing data/lp_events.jsonl.
Data collection brief converts missing funnel-stage source data into owner-reviewed aggregate-count tasks without creating live inputs or writing data/lp_events.jsonl.
Source trust matrix separates scoring-ready inputs from local D1 smoke rows and owner-preview artifacts before sample-gate decisions.
Focused Next P0 browser form exposes only the current owner aggregate rows, exports review files locally, and performs no network calls, staging, or event writes.
Focused Next P0 browser form fixture verifies local-only HTML, aggregate-only export contract, and false red-line flags.
Focused Next P0 owner-download intake validates aggregate CSVs and emits owner-preview CSVs without event writes or external effects.
Focused Next P0 intake fixtures cover valid preview, quick-preview auto-intake, sensitive blocking, and confirmed temp staging without writing project live inputs.
Owner data preflight previews sample-gate and win-rule decisions from aggregate preview CSVs without applying data or executing external gates.
Sample-gate capture calendar turns Day 3 / Day 7 checkpoints into local-only review artifacts without importing calendars or creating reminders.
Sample-gate due status turns Day 3 / Day 7 timing into a local operator signal without importing calendars, opening browsers, writing events, or changing winners.
Week 0 owner capture queue reduces collection to P0 sample-gate counts and remains local-only.
Owner sample-gate status reads filled aggregate counts, reports threshold gaps, and never promotes or applies data automatically.
Owner sample-gate worksheet covers 18 P0 rows and remains local-only.
Owner sample-gate browser form covers 18 P0 rows, exports local files only, and performs no network calls or event writes.
Owner sample-gate browser form fixtures replay downloaded CSVs through source compile and owner sample-gate status without live writes or promotion.
P0 sample-gate batch handoff maps the full 18-row coverage into focused and remaining owner-count batches without event writes or external effects.
Sample-gate collection sprint turns due state and P0 gaps into a local owner queue without event writes or external effects.
Owner sample-gate fixtures cover missing, partial, insufficient, winning-review, underperform, and sensitive-evidence paths without real writes or promotion.
Owner quality review validates aggregate no-quality-regression evidence after a sample-rate winner and still never promotes.
Owner quality-review browser form exports local aggregate JSON only and performs no network calls, event writes, approval queue writes, or promotion.
Owner quality-review browser form fixtures replay downloaded JSON through quality review without live writes, approval queue writes, or promotion.
Owner quality-review fixtures cover waiting, missing evidence, passing evidence, regression, sensitive evidence, and missing fields without external effects.

Candidate retirement fixtures cover sample-insufficient keep-testing, owner promotion review, underperforming retirement, quality-regression retirement, unknown candidates, and mixed summaries without deletion or external effects.
Iteration history records the 7-day loop status, sample gate, archive history, and next safe actions without external effects.
Candidate Worker dry-run validates the bundle and bindings while preserving no-deploy and no-external-effect flags.
Browser route smoke is local and does not write events.
Generated tracking links redirect correctly in isolated local smoke without following external URLs or writing real events.
Worker /e writes expected synthetic funnel events into isolated local D1, rejects sensitive metadata, and preserves redirect attribution.
3q-site candidate and collector pass a two-Worker localhost smoke with exact-origin CORS, no sensitive rows, and no inferred line_add.
Win-rule fixtures cover sample insufficient, winner review only, underperform, and quality regression.
Real-data-shaped filled source-capture ledgers compile to owner-preview aggregate CSVs, then replay through scoring, A/B decision, and next-round planning without writing data/lp_events.jsonl.
Local weekly schedule targets Sunday and weekly:local.
The installed macOS LaunchAgent has completed at least one real weekly runner invocation with exit code 0.
Local catch-up monitor detects missed weekly windows without invoking weekly:local or external actions.
Approval queue includes every unresolved review or external gate and may retire the first-event item after trusted events arrive.
Owner approval resume fixtures stay dry-run only and cover placeholders, valid metadata, secret rejection, URL validation, and manual-only gates.

Owner approval browser form exports non-secret approval metadata only and performs no network call, live input write, gate execution, deploy, GitHub, public link, LINE, payment, customer-data, or delete action.
Owner approval form fixtures replay exports through the dry-run resume planner, block placeholders and sensitive metadata, and never create live input files or execute external actions.
Owner gate evidence intake validates non-secret post-gate metadata only and performs no external action.
Owner gate evidence fixtures cover missing, placeholder, valid, sensitive, invalid A/B, duplicate, manual-only, and invalid GitHub evidence without external action.
Post-gate verification remains local-only and performs no network, remote CLI, deploy, push, public link, LINE, payment, customer-data, or delete action.
Post-gate verification fixtures separate schema evidence readiness from recurring-read authorization while covering dependencies, manual-only gates, and invalid evidence without external action.
GitHub export bundle is repo-ready locally, excludes live owner inputs, and performs no git init, commit, push, PR, deploy, send, payment, customer-data, or delete actions.
Artifact retention monitor reports local bundle/archive/log growth for owner review without generating or executing cleanup commands.
Artifact retention review pack converts monitor output into owner-only cleanup review without commands, mutation, deletion, or external effects.
GitHub Actions workflow is prepared for weekly verify/artifact upload only, with no deploy, push, LINE, payment, customer-data, or delete step.
PreparedButBlocked includes current-state red-line actions without asking for duplicate resource creation.
Red-line priority queue covers every PreparedButBlocked action and keeps external gates non-autorun.
Launch readiness remains owner-gated.
No local artifact claims prohibited external actions.
